a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: (changed) COVID-19: Daily tests vs. daily new confirmed cases per
7-day rolling average. Comparisons across countries are affected by differences in testing policies and reporting methods.

Daily confirmed cases per million people
(cases per million people)

Daily tests per million
(tests per million)
Data source: Official data collated by Our World in Data (2022); World Health Organization (2025); Population based on various sources
Note: Our data on COVID-19 tests and positive rate is no longer updated since 23 June 2022.
